Korean Fit Notes: High internet penetration (97%) and government AI investment (₩10.5tn) support adoption; local AI analytics players create moderate competition.
South Korea's corporate e-learning market (~₩2tn) is growing fast; cultural emphasis on etiquette makes conversation training appealing; needs Korean-language adaptation.
Korea's 97% online population offers fertile ground, but search is dominated by Naver & Google; high technical barrier and heavy competition.
E-commerce is massive (Coupang sales ≈₩40tn, paid membership adoption 65%); sellers need automation; moderate competition and integration challenges.
K-beauty exports ~₩13tn; success relies on influencer marketing; market saturated with many brands; heavy marketing spend required.
